cases.label: happy_path

input.user_message: 两件羽绒和一件羊毛大衣这周末想送洗，你们还能安排吗？

mustInclude: anchor the reply in scope and timing
guide toward a clear next step without overselling
mustAvoid: pretending the exact route is already fixed

cases.label: happy_path

input.user_message: 下周婚礼前想把礼服和西装洗好，这两天有时间沟通吗？

mustInclude: recognize it as a serious booking inquiry
ask for date, item type, and timing
mustAvoid: assuming every garment is the same

cases.label: edge_case

input.user_message: 羊毛大衣会不会缩水？我有点担心洗坏了。

mustInclude: move toward material-specific and evidence-based clarification

cases.label: edge_case

input.user_message: 后天要穿的西装今天能不能先洗出来？有点急。

mustInclude: state that availability depends on schedule and material
guide toward the safest next step
